Our Work

Ten pieces, ten stories.

Each photo below is a real project. Like a style? Send an enquiry directly under it — we'll get back to you on phone or WhatsApp.

01 — Dining Set

Live-Edge Dining Table & Bench

Solid wood dining set with natural live-edge finish, bench seating and cross-leg base.

02 — Bookshelf

Open-Compartment Bookshelf

Solid sheesham wood bookshelf, multi-tier open storage, ideal for living rooms and studies.

03 — Dresser Unit

Walnut Dresser with Mirror

Floor-to-ceiling storage with central mirror, dresser drawers and brass fittings.

04 — Wardrobe + Vanity

Wardrobe with Built-In Vanity

Walnut-finish wardrobe paired with a backlit vanity nook and arched mirror.

05 — Entry Unit

Geometric-Inlay Wardrobe & Mandir Niche

Wardrobe with brass chevron inlay detailing and an integrated mandir/display niche.

06 — Bedroom Set

Natural Wood Wardrobe & Dresser

Light natural-finish wardrobe with matching dresser and mirror, paired with a panel door.

07 — Wardrobe

Linear-Groove Panel Wardrobe

Four-door wardrobe with horizontal groove paneling, drawers and steel pull handles.

08 — Wardrobe

Full-Wall Storage Wardrobe

Wall-to-wall wardrobe with multiple sections — hanging space, shelves and drawers.

09 — Wall Paneling

Decorative Wall Paneling

Textured wall paneling with a carved floral feature panel and matching wardrobe unit.

10 — Entryway Unit

Entryway Wardrobe with Shoe Rack

Combination wardrobe and entryway unit with coat hooks, open slats and ambient lighting.

About Afjal Interiors

Based in Khora Colony, Ghaziabad, we design and build custom furniture and interiors — wardrobes, dressers, dining sets, wall paneling and more — for homes across U.P. and Delhi NCR.

Every piece is measured, designed and made to fit your space, not picked off a shelf.

Solid WoodSheesham, walnut & teak finishes
Custom FitMeasured for your room
Home VisitSite measurement included
Local ServiceGhaziabad & NCR
